mapper.select:
SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP , A.SANEALIAS , A.SAMSTIP , A.SAIFNAME , A.SALOCATIONCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS , A.SZMSTIP , A.SZIFNAME , A.SZLOCATIONCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.ALLOC_CNT , A.RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP , A.SANEALIAS , A.SAMSTIP , A.SAIFNAME , A.SALOCATIONCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS , A.SZMSTIP , A.SZIFNAME , A.SZLOCATIONCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.ALLOC_CNT , ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP , A.SANEALIAS , A.SAMSTIP , A.SAIFNAME , A.SALOCATIONCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE , B.SLVL_NM AS SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS , A.SZMSTIP , A.SZIFNAME , A.SZLOCATIONCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE , C.SLVL_NM AS SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , NVL(D.CNT,0) AS ALLOC_CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A WHERE NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ ) D WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SAOFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SZOFFICESCODE AND D.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ(+) = A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ
AND (A.SAOFFICESCODE IN ( SELECT SLOFFICECODE FROM MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD WHERE SLVL_CD IN (SELECT SSVC_OBJ_CD FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
)) OR A.SZOFFICESCODE IN ( SELECT SLOFFICECODE FROM MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD WHERE SLVL_CD IN (SELECT SSVC_OBJ_CD FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
)))
AND (( MST.FN_IP_TO_NUMBER(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP, 'START') >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND MST.FN_IP_TO_NUMBER(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP, 'END') <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ) OR ( MST.FN_IP_TO_NUMBER(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP, 'START') <= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd}, 'Y') FROM DUAL) AND MST.FN_IP_TO_NUMBER(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP, 'END') >= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_NUMBER(#{searchWrd}, 'N') FROM DUAL) ) )
AND (A.SAOFFICESCODE = #{srssofficescode, jdbcType=CHAR} OR A.SZOFFICESCODE = #{srssofficescode, jdbcType=CHAR})
AND (A.SANEALIAS ILIKE '%' || #{smodelNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR A.SZNEALIAS ILIKE '%' || #{smodelNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
AND (A.SAIFNAME ILIKE '%' || #{sifNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR A.SZIFNAME ILIKE '%' || #{sifNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
AND A.SSAID ILIKE '%' || #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SLLNUM ILIKE '%' || #{sllnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SCONNALIAS ILIKE '%' || #{sconnalias, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
ORDER BY A.PIF_SERIAL_IP
ASC
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY A.PIF_SERIAL_IP ASC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP , A.SANEALIAS , A.SAMSTIP , A.SAIFNAME , A.SALOCATIONCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE , B.SLVL_NM AS SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS , A.SZMSTIP , A.SZIFNAME , A.SZLOCATIONCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE , C.SLVL_NM AS SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST WHERE NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ) AS ALLOC_CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SAOFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SZOFFICESCODE AND A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ = #{nipLinkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP , A.SANEALIAS , A.SAMSTIP , A.SAIFNAME , A.SALOCATIONCODE , A.SAOFFICESCODE , B.SLVL_NM AS SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS , A.SZMSTIP , A.SZIFNAME , A.SZLOCATIONCODE , A.SZOFFICESCODE , C.SLVL_NM AS SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SSAID , A.SLLNUM , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SAOFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SZOFFICESCODE AND CAST(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP AS TEXT) = #{pifSerialIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A SET A.SICISOFFICESCODE = B.SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국수용국 , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS = B.SANEALIAS -- 자국 장비명 , A.SSUBSCMSTIP = B.SAMSTIP -- 자국 대표IP , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION = B.SAIFNAME -- 자국 IF명 , A.SLLNUM = B.SLLNUM -- 전용번호 , A.SCONNALIAS = B.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , A.DMODIFY_DT = SYSDATE , A.SMODIFY_ID = #{smodifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND B.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ AND B.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ = #{nipLinkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A WHERE A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ = #{nipLinkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
